{{ nav.label }}
REBELLIONS DESIGN SYSTEM
Rebellions
Brand Guidelines

Rebellions' Design System ensures a unified brand experience across all touchpoints.
It establishes clear guidelines for foundational elements,
from core graphics to functional UI assets.
01 — LOGO

Logo

The Rebellions logo system consists of symbol, wordmark, and combination marks.
Use the appropriate version for each background and context.

Horizontal
Symbol + Wordmark, side by side
Full Color
Negative / Dark BG
Positive / Light BG
Mono
White / Dark BG
Black / Light BG
Vertical
Symbol above wordmark, stacked layout
Full Color
Negative / Dark BG
Positive / Light BG
Mono
White / Dark BG
Black / Light BG
Symbol Only
For app icons, favicons, and small-format use
Full Color / Dark
Full Color / Light
Mono / Dark
Mono / Light
Wordmark
Text-only logotype, no symbol
White / Dark BG
Black / Light BG
Usage Guidelines
Clear Space

Maintain a minimum clearance equal to the symbol height around the logo. No graphic elements or text should encroach on this area.

Minimum Size

Digital: minimum width 120px. Print: minimum width 30mm. Below these sizes, legibility cannot be guaranteed.

Background

Use the Negative (white) logo on dark backgrounds and the Positive (black) logo on light backgrounds.

Don'ts

Do not alter logo colors, distort proportions, add shadows or effects, rotate, or rearrange logo elements.
02 — TYPOGRAPHY

Typography

Rebellions uses three typeface systems. Each typeface should be applied consistently according to its intended purpose.

Primary English headlines / subheads
Söhne
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ 0123456789 !@#$%
{{ w.label }}
Korean Korean body / Korean headlines
Pretendard
다람쥐 헌 쳇바퀴에 타고파
가나다라마바사아자차카타파하 0123456789
{{ w.label }}
Secondary Tech labels / code / captions
Space Mono
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ 0123456789
{{ w.label }}
Type Scale
Display Rebellions_ 48px / 700
H1 Power AI Inference 36px / 700
H2 Efficiently, at Scale 28px / 600
H3 Chiplet Design Strategy 22px / 600
H4 Scalable Architecture 18px / 600
Subtitle 1 AI 추론 반도체의 새로운 기준 20px / 500
Subtitle 2 효율적인 대규모 추론 처리 16px / 600
Body L Rebellions builds purpose-built AI inference chips. 18px / 400
Body Rebellions designs AI inference semiconductors. 16px / 400
Body S 전력 효율과 성능의 균형을 실현합니다. 14px / 400
Caption Built for inference, efficient by design 13px / 400
Overline SECTION HEADING 12px / Mono 700
Label SECTION LABEL 11px / Mono 400
Code const model = new RBLN(); 14px / Mono 400
03 — COLOR & GRADIENT

Color & Gradient

Our color palette expands on the Rebellions aesthetic—neon green at the core, balanced with precise neutrals and purposeful accent colors.

Green at the core

Rebellions Green is the centerpoint of the color palette. Combined with the precision of black and white,
it creates the signature identity that defines every Rebellions touchpoint.

The palette

The full palette extends from the neutral gray family to the secondary color spectrum. Each experience should be dominated by the grays and the core colors—black, white, and Rebellions Green—allowing the secondary colors to provide vibrancy and purpose.

Grays

The neutral gray scale provides nuance and meaningful moments of color.
Five grays from F6F8FA to 1B1F23 cover the full range of backgrounds and text, ensuring every design maintains legibility and hierarchy.

Specifications

Click any swatch to copy the HEX value. Colors are organized by family, from light to dark.

Primary
{{ c.label }} {{ c.hex }}
{{ c.label }} {{ c.hex }}
Secondary
{{ c.label }} {{ c.hex }}
Gradients

Use combinations within any of the acceptable color families when blending gradients.
Do not blend between colors that are more than two steps away from each other. Click to copy CSS value.

Green 50 → 70
Green 90 → Black
Gray → Black
Green → Teal
Primary
{{ g.name }} {{ g.desc }}
Mono
{{ g.name }} {{ g.desc }}
Secondary
{{ g.name }} {{ g.desc }}
Primary + Hue
{{ g.name }} {{ g.desc }}
Don't mix colors outside accepted families.
Avoid blending colors more than 2 steps apart.
Avoid gradients with more than two colors.
04 — BRAND EXPRESSION

Brand Expression

An isometric cube grid system that forms the visual identity of Rebellions.

Adjust grid size, motion, neon effects, angles, and more to generate brand graphics exportable as SVG/PNG/GIF.
Controls Guide
SCALE-UP

Adjust cube height. Scale from chip to tower.

GRID

Set grid size, spacing, and view angle. Adjustable from 10° (side) to 60° (top).

MOTION

Four motion presets: Breathe, Wave, Pulse, and Static.

STYLE

Fine-tune deformation, neon ratio, speed, stroke width, opacity, and more.

EFFECTS

Add depth and focus with Height Brightness and Edge Fade.

EXPORT

Export in three formats: SVG (vector), PNG (raster), GIF (animated).

{{ exprModeLabel }}

07 — ICONOGRAPHY

Iconography

Click an icon to download it as a PNG. Use the bottom-left button to toggle between Black and White sets.

{{ icon.name }}
Guidelines
Style

Line-style icons with consistent stroke width.

Color

Icon_B on light backgrounds, Icon_W on dark backgrounds.

Download

Click on any icon card to download as PNG file.

{{ iconModeLabel }}
